title: Inverted Craft
description: Have you ever wanted to turn an iron shovel into an ingot, or diamond breastplates into diamonds? Now it's possible!
body:
# **Utility**
**This datapack allows you to craft lots of items in the opposite direction! For example, transform a diamond breastplate into 8 diamonds etc...**

### **exemple**
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95e5cfddcecfadcee44d7310b387d68528264347.png)

# **Features**

### **you can :**
- transforming leather armour into leather
- transforming horse saddles into leather
- transforming iron armour into iron ingots
- transforming gold armour into gold ingots
- transforming diamond armour into diamonds
- transforming netherite armour into a **ONE** netherite ingot
- transforming iron tools into ingots only
- transforming gold tools into ingots only
- transforming diamond tools to diamond only
- transforming netherite tools to netherite only
- transforming iron and gold pressure plates into ingots
- transforming iron doors, hatches and bars into ingots
- transforming bows and crossbows into strings
- transforming mass into a heavy core
- transforming shields into planks of wood
- transforming sugar and paper into sugar cane
- transforming the wooden planks into wood log
- transforming discs into other discs
  
### **that's all for now**
